title: agropyron elongatum subsp. flaccidifolium
intro: Agropyron elongatum subsp. flaccidifolium, also known as blue wildrye or blue grama, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of blue wildrye include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even help to lower blood pressure. Blue wildrye is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
